spacing_and_layout.card_style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

image_urls.usage: Use as the right-side or left-side background image panel on the authentication screens to provide a premium, modern feel.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all icons. Keep icon weight consistent (strokeWidth={2}).

sidebar_navigation.style: Fixed, white background, border-r border-slate-200. Links should have hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-black. Active link should be bold with a left-accent border.

dashboard.chart: Use Recharts for a simple 7-day revenue bar chart if applicable.

note_generator_flow.layout: Two-column layout on large screens. Left: Form inputs for Customer, Delivery Fee, and Items list. Right: Real-time live preview of the receipt/note.
note_generator_flow.order_number: Auto-generate using DDMMYY + sequential (e.g., 260426001 for April 26, 2026, order 1).
note_generator_flow.price_tiers: When adding a product to the note, display a grouped button or select field indicating Azul, Verde, Amarela, Vermelha with their respective colors to quickly pick the tier for that item.
note_generator_flow.calculations: Line Item Total = Price * Qty. Subtotal = Sum of Line Items. Total = Subtotal + Delivery Fee.

print_view.css_rules: Add @media print styles to hide sidebar, header, and action buttons. The printed note should occupy 100% width, remove background colors (save ink), and emphasize borders and text contrast.

animations.interactions: Use subtle hover state transitions (duration-200 ease-in-out) on buttons and rows.
animations.page_transitions: Fade-in entrance for dashboard elements to feel polished.

accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:outline-none.
accessibility.data_testid: CRITICAL: All buttons, inputs, table rows, and modals MUST include descriptive data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid="create-note-button").

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all copy is in Brazilian Portuguese (PT-BR).
Set up JWT-based mock authentication flow to protect dashboard routes.
Implement the 4 product price tiers strictly using the color logic provided in the 'colors.product_tiers' object.
Build a clean printable component for the Non-Fiscal Note using '@media print' hiding the rest of the UI.
Use Shadcn UI for tables, inputs, dialogs, and select components.
Implement date formatting strictly as DD/MM/YYYY.
Ensure the layout breaks down correctly to a stacked mobile view for smaller screens.
